# Praxis Public

Generated: 2026-06-25T19:41:58.434766+00:00
Source: commit `9375315` on `main`

Praxis is the Control Alt workflow ledger.
Praxis Public is the public-readable orientation layer — not the operational ledger.
Private Praxis retains implementation and deployment authority.

## Object kinds

- **Signal**: Low-authority captured idea or observation preserved for later triage
- **Campaign**: Coordinated multi-lane effort spanning agents, repos, and decision checkpoints
- **Beacon**: Current navigation, state, and evidence map for a Campaign or Strand
- **Strand**: A continuing line of attention kept open toward an outcome; may be active, paused, or completed
- **Fiber**: Small identifiable work unit that advances a parent Strand
- **Directive**: Instruction object: authorized action, explicit boundaries, validation expectations, stop conditions
- **Readout**: Recorded result from a bounded evaluation run of an agent, provider, workflow, or related system
- **Probe**: Reusable check — observation-first pass/fail evidence
- **Protocol**: Repeatable procedure composed of steps an operator or agent can run
- **Doctrine**: Reusable guidance that outlives a single task
- **Imprint**: Durable rationale or decision trace

## Active campaigns

- **Campaign: Make the Control Alt Development workflow more flexible (cursor is dead)**
  The Control Alt development workflow must stop depending on Cursor as the single implementation agent or workflow host.

## Active strands

- **Axiom Owner Workbench Strand** — Axiom / Praxis / Owner workflow
  This Strand tracks a continuing line of attention around making Axiom usable as an owner-facing operating surface for Praxis-backed Control Alt work.
- **Praxis Public Solution** — Praxis / Public access / Control Alt workflow
  Create a public-readable Praxis layer that improves Control Alt workflow continuity, agent review, and Mara/ChatGPT access without exposing private implementation repos, private handoffs, runtime reports, LAN/device details, or unfinished product code.

## Active fibers (recently updated)

- **Praxis Public Functional MVP** — Praxis / Public access / Agent workflow replacement
  Move Praxis Public from seed / proof-of-comprehension into a functional MVP that can support real Control Alt workflow. The MVP must reduce chat-memory drift, private-connector luck, and operator re-explanation.
- **Praxis Public Generated Publisher v0** — Praxis / Public access / Generated context
  Make Praxis Public a generated, public-safe projection of private Praxis rather than a manually maintained documentation repo.

## Authority boundary

- Reading: allowed for orientation and context.
- Modifying private repos: NOT authorized from Public Praxis.
- Deploying services: NOT authorized from Public Praxis.
- Implementation: requires a private Directive from private Praxis.

## Agent load order

1. README.md
2. PUBLIC_PRIVATE_BOUNDARY.md
3. CURRENT_OPERATING_MODEL.md
4. CURRENT_WORK.md
5. prompts/agent-startup.md

  The Control Alt development workflow must stop depending on Cursor as the single implementation agent or workflow host.

  This Strand tracks a continuing line of attention around making Axiom usable as an owner-facing operating surface for Praxis-backed Control Alt work.
- Human names, hidden machinery [complete]
- Praxis Provider Model Evaluation [paused]
  Provide the bounded thread for Praxis-owned provider/model evaluation work inside the Control Alt Development Workflow Flexibility Campaign.
- Praxis Public Solution [active]
  Create a public-readable Praxis layer that improves Control Alt workflow continuity, agent review, and Mara/ChatGPT access without exposing private implementation repos, private handoffs, runtime reports, LAN/device details, or unfinished product code.
- Public Praxis Seed — Compatibility Locator [superseded]

- Control Alt Development Workflow Flexibility Beacon [active]
- Praxis Evaluation Harness Need Beacon [active]

### Fibers (51)

- Axiom Owner Workbench Scope v0 Fiber [complete]
  Scope the owner-facing Axiom operating surface before any implementation. The result should define what Axiom should show and prepare for the owner-operator so that Praxis becomes easier to use, not another ledger the operator must manually audit.
- Axiom Page Template Audit v0 [complete]
  Audit Axiom page types and define a v0 page-template taxonomy before designing or implementing any one-off action page.
- Axiom Praxis Campaign Cockpit v0 [complete]
  Define the Axiom/Praxis cockpit lane: Axiom should help the operator continue creating Control Alt systems using Praxis truth, without bypassing Praxis authority or collapsing planned work into a general operational surface.
- Axiom Project/Repo Registry Consumption (Design) [complete]
  Design — not implement — how a future, separately-authorized Axiom PR would consume `doctrine-control-alt-project-repo-registry-v1` to replace the hardcoded `_RAW_ALLOWLIST` constant in `backend/praxis_execution_action_target_repo_allowlist.py`, while preserving v0's exact…
- Control Alt Project/Repo Registry v1 (Design) [complete]
  Design — not implement — a v1 first-class Control Alt project/repo registry for Praxis: a canonical, queryable mapping from stable project identifiers (`praxis`, `axiom`, `standards`, `lcard`, ...) to their real repo identity, replacing the need for any future consumer to…
- Operator Identity & Merge Authorization Cleanup (Governance) [complete]
  Record a small governance cleanup: an agent-held memory note used stale, ambiguous operator-identity wording during the PR #40 merge flow, and state the going-forward rule plainly so it does not recur. Design/cleanup only. No authorization behavior changes in code.
- Praxis Codex Comment Fixups [complete]
  Address the verified Codex automated-review comments from PRs #6, #9, and #10 before starting `fiber-praxis-local-worker-post-apply-ergonomics`, so review debt doesn't compound while local-worker surface area keeps growing.
- Praxis Eval Comparison Rollup [complete]
  Add a small comparison rollup for Praxis eval artifacts.
- Praxis Eval DeepSeek Run Action Readiness [complete]
  Prepare the already-selected DeepSeek V4 Flash live eval to become a correctly-shaped runnable action before spending a provider call.
- Praxis Eval DeepSeek V4 Flash Focused Live Run [complete]
  Run one bounded, suite-scoped live evaluation against `accounts/fireworks/models/deepseek-v4-flash`, then record artifact paths, usage accounting, JSON-format behavior, and rollup inclusion evidence.
- Praxis Eval Live Model Preflight [complete]
  Bake provider-native model discovery and model preflight into live `praxis-eval` runs so Praxis does not begin a provider-backed evaluation with an unvalidated or guessed model identifier.
- Praxis Eval Model Family Filtering [complete]
  Add a small family/pattern exclusion mechanism to `praxis-eval` auto model selection.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenario Pack [active]
  Add a small quality scenario pack to Praxis evals.
- Praxis Eval Quality Scenarios [active]
  Add an opt-in quality scenario pack to `praxis-eval`.
- Praxis Eval Rollup Coverage Reconciliation [complete]
  Create a bounded implementation target to reconcile Praxis eval rollup coverage so future provider/model comparisons use a trustworthy artifact inventory.
- Praxis Eval Runner Prototype [deferred]
  Create a small, bounded implementation lane for a `praxis-eval-runner` prototype.
- Praxis Eval Usage Efficiency [active]
  Track token usage as part of model viability.
- Praxis Exec Direct API Prototype Fiber [active]
  Develop `praxis-exec` as a Praxis-owned local implementation harness that can use direct provider APIs as engines without replacing Cursor with another paid coding-agent wrapper.
- Praxis Execution Action Apply Gate v0 [complete]
  Add opt-in approval verification to `praxis-local-worker apply`, using the append-only approval event log from PR #21 — `apply --require-approval` refuses unless the latest recorded decision is a still-matching approval.
- Praxis Execution Action Approval Events v0 [complete]
